::: {.column width="35%"}


![](content/img/pic_pro2026.jpg){fig-alt="Portrait" style="max-width:250px"}

*I enjoy working at the interplay of data, biology and real-world questions.*


📧 angelique.porciani\@gmail.com

[GitHub](https://github.com/)\
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/)
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}

Hello! I’m Angélique Porciani, a biostatistician and data analyst with over 12 years of experience working with complex data in life sciences.

Over the years, I’ve developed strong expertise in statistical modelling and data analysis with R, applied to a wide range of projects in epidemiology, health, and environmental sciences.

I particularly enjoy working with complex, time-dependent data, such as time series and longitudinal datasets, using statistical and machine learning approaches to explore patterns and support data-driven decisions. I also have experience with survival and dose-response models in the context of evaluating treatment efficacy.

More broadly, I’m interested in leveraging data to better understand complex systems and inform decision-making, whether in research or applied contexts. I’m especially motivated by projects where data can bring clarity to real-world challenges.

Beyond the technical side, I’ve coordinated projects, collaborated with diverse stakeholders, and communicated results to both technical and non-technical audiences. I enjoy working in interdisciplinary environments and value collaboration and knowledge sharing.

I’m currently seeking opportunities as a data analyst where I can apply my analytical skills to real-world data and contribute to impactful, data-driven projects.
:::

:::

---


::: columns

::: column
::: {.card style="padding:1em; margin:0.5em; background-color:#fdf2e9; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);"}
### 🛠 Skills

**Languages & Tools:** R (tidyverse, dplyr, ggplot2), SAS, SQL, Excel, Latex, 
Quarto, Python, bash, Notion

**Statistical Methods:** descriptive statistics, regression linear or not, 
survival & dose-response modelling 

**Machine Learning:** variable selection, clustering, predictive modelling  

**Data Visualization & Reporting:** dynamics html report (Quarto), KPI creation, 
summary tables, clear visual communication  

**Soft Skills:** collaboration, teaching, project coordination, 
interdisciplinary teamwork
:::
:::

::: column
::: {.card style="padding:1em; margin:0.5em; background-color:#eaf2f8; border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);"}
### Current Focus

* **Cleaning, transforming, and exploring** complex datasets for actionable insights 
 
* Creating **clear visualizations**, dashboards, and indicators for decision-making  

* Applying **statistical modelling & machine learning** to real-world biological data  

* **Time-dependent data**: time series, longitudinal datasets  

* **Survival & dose-response** analyses to evaluate new molecules or interventions

:::
:::

:::
